mentions.text:
US government shutdown confirmed.

As I expected a few hours ago, Polymarket  was pricing in almost 100% confirmation of a shutdown. 

Institutions and traders already know about it but retail will panic on the news.

Use this golden opportunity to build long positions. https://t.co/HCkIqwCtnd

mentions.text:
@commonsenseplay You’re doing it at the wrong time though, there’s two rate cuts incoming priced in at 71%. Trump has every incentive to inflate markets and influence fed for midterms next year. 

The other crashes were partly because interest rates were hiked.
